lesson.title: CAPS.NaturalSciences.Gr9.EC.4: Transverse and longitudinal waves. Properties: wavelength...
lesson.explanation: Waves transfer energy without transferring matter. Transverse waves have particles vibrating perpendicular to the wave direction (e.g., light). Longitudinal waves have particles vibrating parallel (e.g., sound). Reflection: angle of incidence = angle of reflection. Refraction: light bends when it enters a different medium because its speed changes. Sound needs a medium to travel — it cannot travel through a vacuum.
